translation.en: They want to hand out the gifts.

content.sentence: Họ muốn ___ quà cho mọi người.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I will deliver letters to everyone tomorrow morning.
The post office worker is delivering the package in front of my house.
She delivers free bread to the poor every week.
notes:
phát = to deliver or hand out something to people. Think “give out” in an organized way.

It’s a verb, often used when distributing things: letters, tickets, gifts, food, documents. It also commonly means “to broadcast” (radio, TV) or “to emit” (sound, light).

Close memory link: phát ≈ “distribute”; for casual “give,” use cho, not phát.

example.en: He delivers letters to our house.
example.vi: Anh ấy phát thư đến nhà chúng tôi.
example.es: Él entrega cartas a nuestra casa.

definitions.es: Entregar o repartir algo de forma organizada.
definitions.en: To deliver or hand out something in an organized way.
definitions.vi: Giao hoặc phát cái gì đó một cách có tổ chức.

notes_md:
**phát** = to deliver or hand out something to people. Think “give out” in an organized way.

It’s a verb, often used when distributing things: letters, tickets, gifts, food, documents. It also commonly means “to broadcast” (radio, TV) or “to emit” (sound, light).


Close memory link: *phát* ≈ “distribute”; for casual “give,” use **cho**, not *phát*.
exampleSentences: Anh sẽ phát thư cho mọi người vào sáng mai.
Nhân viên bưu điện đang phát bưu phẩm trước cửa nhà em.
Chị ấy phát bánh mì miễn phí cho người nghèo mỗi tuần.

content.sentence: Anh sẽ ___ thư vào sáng mai.

translation.en: I will deliver the letters tomorrow morning.
